overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia walking through a sunlit Mediterranean-style countryside with rolling hills, wildflowers, and vineyards, approaching and passing through a red stone villa estate.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through sunlit meadows with scattered wildflowers

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the grass
distinctive broad-crowned tree dominating the skyline ahead
clusters of purple flowers lining the path
scattered red flowers in the grass
red-roofed stone building visible on the distant hillside
wooden posts marking the path boundary
green undulating terrain with scattered trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit rural path winding through meadows filled with purple and red wildflowers. A large umbrella-shaped tree dominates the center of the view while a distant red villa sits atop the rolling hills. The character walks steadily forward along the dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: vineyard path with stone retaining walls

events.description: landscape becomes more structured with stone walls and vineyard terraces appearing

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as it curves gently through terraced vineyard hills

entered.detail: low stone walls supporting the terraced hillsides
stepped agricultural terraces with grape vines
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the horizon

segments.scene_description: The path curves through terraced vineyard country, with stone retaining walls appearing along the route. The red villa grows larger as the character approaches, transitioning from a distant landmark to a prominent mid-ground feature. Cypress trees line the horizon while the open meadow gives way to more structured agricultural terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: villa entrance with stone gateposts and courtyard

events.description: arriving at the red stone villa, passing through stone gateposts
passing through the stone archway of the villa building

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the villa grounds, walking through the stone archway

notable_agents.action: villager in simple clothing standing near the gatepost observing the approach
villager carrying goods near the villa entrance

entered.detail: tall stone pillars marking the villa entrance
arched stone passage through the villa building
wooden wagon with goods parked near the villa
organized rows of grape vines along the path

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the red stone villa, passing between stone gateposts where villagers stand nearby. The architecture features weathered red plaster and stone foundations. After passing through a stone archway in the villa structure, the path continues toward a wooden bridge, with vineyard rows visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with wooden bridge and well

events.description: crossing a wooden bridge over a small stream or dry creek

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge and continuing past the village well

notable_agents.action: villager drawing water from the stone well with a bucket

entered.detail: rustic wooden footbridge with railings crossing a depression
old stone well with wooden roof structure and winch
small stone building with tiled roof near the path

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wooden bridge leaving the villa grounds, passing a stone well where a villager draws water. Small village houses line the left side of the path while the landscape opens up again to rolling hills ahead. The path continues through the village outskirts toward the distant countryside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a wild, flower-filled meadow through a structured vineyard estate and into a rustic village. It begins on a winding dirt path amidst purple and red wildflowers, moving past a large umbrella-shaped tree toward a red villa perched on distant rolling hills. As the character advances, the open meadows transition into terraced vineyard country with stone retaining walls and cypress trees, bringing the red villa into prominent view. The scene then shifts as the character passes through stone gateposts and a weathered red plaster archway, moving deeper into the estate toward a wooden bridge. Finally, the camera crosses the bridge past a stone well and small village houses, leaving the villa grounds behind as the path opens back up toward the distant countryside.
